findings.message: Added EditMode and PlayMode test assembly definitions so Unity Test Framework discovers concrete tests.
Unity MCP test discovery now finds 9 tests: 6 EditMode and 3 PlayMode.
EditMode tests cover Stage1 required roots, Systems runtime components, UI surfaces/HUD buttons, required prefabs, Build Settings, and StageDefinition asset presence.
PlayMode tests cover Stage1 load/start room, runtime systems/UI surfaces after load, and MapRuntimeSystem marker coverage.
Unity MCP script validation reported zero diagnostics for both smoke test source files.
Unity EditMode test job d062f3576d07454faa9e90f3f10f298a succeeded: 6 of 6 completed with no failures.
Unity PlayMode test job f7888791742346739ee790d2eaf9e151 succeeded: 3 passed, 0 failed, 0 skipped.
All added test files and asmdef files have generated .meta files.

followups: Add deeper puzzle-chain and game-over restart PlayMode coverage.
Run interactive final playtest tuning for hit areas, map marker positions, and monster/hiding balance.
Consider a deterministic generated-player smoke quit hook for build artifact validation.
